{{Quote|On many occasions, K'lial and Diskio are assigned as backup on operations where there is a significant chance that an operative will be apprehended by local authorities. One such operation was the infiltration of the TGM corporate headquarters on Pako Ramoon (see Rebel agent Kara Via's report).|Personal addendum by General Airen Cracken to an entry of a datafile detailing Rebel Alliance operatives dedicated to K'lial and Diskio Khzrry|<ref name="CRO" />}}
'''Pako Ramoon''' was an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] astronomical object located in the [[Rayter sector/Legends|Rayter sector]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], [[TransGalMeg Industries, Incorporated]] [[TGM corporate headquarters|corporate headquarters]] were situated there. At one point, while the company's [[Security guard/Legends|guards]] were escorting the apprehended [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] operative [[Basal Moor]] through the headquarters, the Alliance agents [[K'lial Khzrry|K'lial]] and [[Diskio Khzrry]] distracted the guards and extracted Moor via the use of a remote-controlled [[Landspeeder/Legends|ground speeder]].

==Description==
Pako Ramoon was a terrestrial celestial body<ref name="CRO" /> situated in the [[Pako Ramoon system/Legends|Pako Ramoon system]], a part of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Rayter sector/Legends|Rayter sector]].<ref name="EAOC" />

==History==
[[File:KlialKhzrry-CRO.jpg|thumb|right|300px|K'lial and Diskio Khzrry (K'lial pictured) at one point carried out an extraction of an apprehended Rebel Alliance operative on Pako Ramoon.]]
By the [[Imperial Era/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]],<ref name="CRO" /> [[TransGalMeg Industries, Incorporated]] (TGM)<ref name="Abduction">{{WEGCite|book=Classic Adventures|story=The Abduction|stext=The Abduction of Crying Dawn Singer}}</ref> maintained [[TGM corporate headquarters|corporate headquarters]] on Pako Ramoon. At one point during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] operative [[Basal Moor]] was apprehended on Pako Ramoon, and the [[Xi'Dec/Legends|Xi'Dec]] agents [[K'lial Khzrry|K'lial]] and [[Diskio Khzrry]] were sent to extract him.<ref name="CRO" />

While TGM [[Security guard/Legends|guards]] were escorting Moor through the lobby of the company's corporate headquarters, the Xi'Dec pair—who were posing as recruiters seeking individuals of new [[Gender/Legends|sexes]] to add to their [[Khzrry family unit|family unit]] via [[Marriage/Legends|marriage]]—distracted the guards and then used a remotely operated [[Landspeeder/Legends|ground speeder]] that crashed through the lobby's [[Window/Legends|windows]] to escape together with Moor. The Rebel agent [[Kara Via]] subsequently wrote a report on the incident on Pako Ramoon, which, at some point by the time shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Alliance [[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]] included in an entry dedicated to the Khzrrys that was part of a [[Datafile/Legends|datafile]] detailing various Rebel operatives.<ref name="CRO" />

==Behind the scenes==
Pako Ramoon was created by [[Chuck Truett]] and was introduced in ''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'', a [[1994]] [[West End Games]] sourcebook published for use with ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="CRO" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Pako Ramoon [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the celestial body, in grid square J-19.<ref name="TEA" />
